So, so there's there's stuff I do same purpose that they did it to try and raise the To use the cycle battle term self-esteem self-image self-concept of people about selling Marketing and being in business has being a noble and worthy pursuit So that they then Are out of their own way in doing it better more aggressively More profitably and more successfully.
